# Design System — Sao Mộc · Jupiter Solutions Technology

**Generated by:** UI UX Pro Max skill + Jupiter brand requirements  
**Design Direction:** Precision Authority  
**Date:** 2026-07-16  
**Status:** Active — v2.4

---

## 1. Brand Identity

| Key | Value |
|-----|-------|
| Vietnamese name | Sao Mộc |
| English name | Jupiter Solutions |
| Full name | Sao Mộc · Jupiter Solutions Technology |
| Tagline (VI) | Quỹ đạo của đổi mới |
| Tagline (EN) | Orbit of Innovation |
| Primary brand anchor | Deep Burgundy `#800020` |
| Graphic language | Precision Orbit |

---

## 2. UI UX Pro Max — Applied Recommendations

**Detected product type:** B2B Enterprise Technology Services  
**Selected landing pattern:** Trust & Authority + Conversion + Enterprise Gateway  
**Selected primary style:** Swiss Modernism 2.0  
**Selected supporting styles:** Minimalism, Dimensional Layering (restrained), Micro-interactions  
**Selected typography:** Plus Jakarta Sans (primary) + JetBrains Mono (technical)  
**Selected effects:** Fade-up reveal, scale-in hero, SVG path draw, hover-lift, expanding underline  

**Rejected from skill defaults:**  
- ❌ AI Personalization Landing pattern → too abstract, no analytics available  
- ❌ Roboto/Material Design typography → Android aesthetic, wrong for Vietnamese B2B  
- ❌ Professional navy + blue CTA palette → Jupiter has approved burgundy identity  
- ❌ Bento Box Grid → too Apple-casual for enterprise trust context  

---

## 3. Color System

### 3.1 Brand Palette — Deep Burgundy

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--color-brand-50` | `#FBF1F2` | Very pale burgundy tint (eyebrow BG, brand-tint sections) |
| `--color-brand-100` | `#F5D9DC` | Light tint (selection highlight, CTA hover BG) |
| `--color-brand-200` | `#EEB3BA` | Soft accent (border hover states) |
| `--color-brand-300` | `#E17F8B` | Medium accent (dark section eyebrow) |
| `--color-brand-400` | `#CE4F5E` | — |
| `--color-brand-500` | `#B23043` | Secondary brand accent, list bullets |
| `--color-brand-600` | `#800020` | **PRIMARY** — CTAs, active nav, key accents |
| `--color-brand-700` | `#5E0018` | Hover state for primary CTAs |
| `--color-brand-800` | `#400010` | Strong emphasis, outcome text |
| `--color-brand-900` | `#260009` | Dark backgrounds with burgundy undertone |
| `--color-brand-950` | `#130004` | Near-black burgundy, dark section base |

### 3.2 Semantic Text Colors

| Token | Value | Role |
|-------|-------|------|
| `--color-text-primary` | `#0F172A` | Headings, key labels |
| `--color-text-secondary` | `#475569` | Body copy, descriptions |
| `--color-text-muted` | `#64748B` | Metadata, captions |
| `--color-text-subtle` | `#94A3B8` | Decorative/disabled |

### 3.3 Surface Colors

| Token | Value | Role |
|-------|-------|------|
| `--color-bg-default` | `#FAFAFA` | Page background |
| `--color-surface-card` | `#FFFFFF` | Card surfaces |
| `--color-surface-alt` | `#F5F5F7` | Alternate sections (neutral) |
| `--color-surface-dark` | `#141419` | Dark sections with charcoal undertone |
| `--color-surface-darker` | `#0E0E12` | Footer |

### 3.4 Border Colors

| Token | Value | Role |
|-------|-------|------|
| `--color-border-default` | `#E2E8F0` | Standard borders |
| `--color-border-subtle` | `#F1F5F9` | Light dividers |
| `--color-border-emphasis` | `#CBD5E1` | Strong dividers |
| `--color-border-brand` | `rgba(128,0,32,0.20)` | Tinted brand borders |

### 3.5 Burgundy Usage Rules

**Permitted:**
- Primary CTA background
- Active navigation states
- Selected states
- Eyebrow labels
- Key section dividers
- Brand graphics / SVG marks
- Index chips
- Left-bar accents on hover

**Prohibited:**
- Every heading simultaneously
- Every icon
- Every card border at once
- Multiple full-page section backgrounds in succession
- Large quantities of body text
- Gradient text

---

## 4. Typography

### 4.1 Font Families

| Role | Family | Variable |
|------|--------|----------|
| Primary (UI) | Plus Jakarta Sans | `--font-sans` |
| Monospace (technical) | JetBrains Mono | `--font-mono` |

**Loading:** Via `next/font/google` with `subsets: ['vietnamese', 'latin']`

### 4.2 Scale — Clamp-based

| Variant | Clamp Range | Weight | Tracking |
|---------|-------------|--------|----------|
| `display` (hero H1) | `clamp(40px, 4vw+1rem, 64px)` | 800 | -0.025em |
| `h1` (page title) | `clamp(32px, 3vw+0.75rem, 52px)` | 700 | -0.02em |
| `h2` (section) | `clamp(24px, 2vw+0.5rem, 36px)` | 600 | -0.015em |
| `h3` (card) | `clamp(18px, 1.5vw+0.25rem, 26px)` | 600 | -0.01em |
| `h4` | `17–18px` | 600 | tight |
| `body-large` | `17–20px` | 400 | — |
| `body` | `15–17px` | 400 | — |
| `body-small` | `14px` | 400 | — |
| `caption` | `12px` | 500 | wide |
| Eyebrow label | `11px` | 700 | 0.1em uppercase |
| Index chip | `11px mono` | 700 | 0.06em |

### 4.3 Rules
- Sentence case throughout (not TITLE CASE headings)
- No gradient text
- No ultra-thin weight (<400) in UI
- No excessive letter-spacing on body text
- Vietnamese diacritics: use `text-wrap: balance` + `text-wrap: pretty`

---

## 5. Spacing

Base unit: **4px**. Use multiples of 4.

| Token | px | Use |
|-------|----|-----|
| 4px | 4 | Icon padding, micro-gaps |
| 8px | 8 | Inner card padding tight |
| 12px | 12 | Tag gap |
| 16px | 16 | Component padding (sm) |
| 20px | 20 | Card padding |
| 24px | 24 | Card padding (lg) |
| 32px | 32 | Section inner gap |
| 48px | 48 | Between major components |
| 64px | 64 | Section padding (md) |
| 96px | 96 | Section padding (lg) |

---

## 6. Grid

- 12-column Swiss grid
- Max container: 1280px (`container-center`)
- Wide container: 1440px (`container-wide`)
- Desktop gutter: 48px (3rem)
- Tablet gutter: 32px (2rem)
- Mobile gutter: 20px (1.25rem)

---

## 7. Border Radius

Strict, small-radius system (not pill-heavy):

| Token | px | Use |
|-------|----|----|
| `--radius-xs` | 2px | Tags, badges, chips |
| `--radius-sm` | 4px | Buttons, focus rings |
| `--radius-md` | 6px | Input fields |
| `--radius-lg` | 8px | Cards |
| `--radius-xl` | 12px | Hero panel, feature frames |
| `--radius-2xl` | 16px | Large modal |
| `--radius-full` | 9999px | Avatars only |

---

## 8. Elevation / Shadows

| Token | Value | Use |
|-------|-------|-----|
| `--shadow-xs` | `0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04)` | Buttons default |
| `--shadow-sm` | `0 1px 4px rgba(...) + 0 1px 2px` | Cards default |
| `--shadow-md` | `0 4px 8px rgba(...) + 0 2px 4px` | Card hover |
| `--shadow-lg` | `0 8px 24px rgba(...) + 0 4px 8px` | Modal, important float |
| `--shadow-brand` | `0 0 0 3px rgba(128,0,32,0.15)` | Focus rings on brand elements |

---

## 9. Motion Tokens

```css
--motion-instant:  80ms;
--motion-fast:    140ms;
--motion-base:    200ms;
--motion-medium:  320ms;
--motion-slow:    480ms;

--ease-standard: cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1);
--ease-enter:    cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
--ease-exit:     cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 1, 1);
```

### Rules
- NEVER use `transition: all`
- Always specify properties: `transition-[background-color,border-color,box-shadow,transform,opacity]`
- Hero reveal: fade-up + scale-in, total ≤ 600ms stagger
- Hover lifts: `translateY(-2px)` max
- SVG draw: `stroke-dashoffset` animation, one-time only
- Scroll reveal: `opacity` + `translateY(16px)` via IntersectionObserver

### Reduced Motion
```css
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  /* All animations instantly resolve to final state */
  /* Content visible without JavaScript */
}
```

---

## 10. Component Patterns

### Eyebrow Label
```html
<span class="eyebrow">Section Category</span>
```
- 11px, bold, uppercase, 0.1em tracking
- Brand-600 color on `brand-50` background
- With `::before` dot decoration
- Dark variant: `.eyebrow-dark` for dark sections

### Index Chip
```html
<span class="index-chip">01</span>
```
- 11px monospace, bold, brand-600 on brand-50
- Used for service/process numbering

### Brand Bar (left accent)
```html
<div class="brand-bar">...</div>
```
- 2px left border in `brand-600`
- Used for quotes, address displays, feature callouts

### Divider with Orbit Dot
```html
<div class="divider-orbit" aria-hidden="true"></div>
```
- 1px horizontal rule + 8px brand-600 center dot
- Used between homepage sections

### Hover Lift
```css
.hover-lift {
  transition: transform, box-shadow, border-color;
}
.hover-lift:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); }
```

---

## 11. Section Variants

| Variant | Background | Use |
|---------|-----------|-----|
| `default` | `#FAFAFA` | Standard sections |
| `alternate` | `#FFFFFF` | White sections (with border-y) |
| `subtle` | `#F5F5F7` | Softened alternate |
| `brand-tint` | `#FBF1F2` | Brand-flavored callout |
| `dark` | `#141419` | Dark editorial sections |
| `dark-brand` | `#141419` + gradient | Final CTA sections |

---

## 12. Graphic Language — Precision Orbit

### Vocabulary Elements (use sparingly)
- Thin elliptical orbit arcs
- Dashed concentric tracking circles  
- Radial connector lines from center hub
- Rectangular module chips with monospace labels
- Center hub with geometric J letterform
- Node dots (2–3px circles) at connection points
- Corner coordinate marks (`+` in monospace, very light)
- Technical metadata labels (geolocation, version)

### Rules
- ✅ Abstract representation of connected systems
- ✅ Engineering diagram aesthetic  
- ✅ Hidden J letterform in center hub
- ❌ Literal planet imagery
- ❌ Galaxy backgrounds / stars
- ❌ Glowing particles or sci-fi HUD
- ❌ Infinite rotation animation
- ❌ Cartoon-style illustrations

---

## 13. Accessibility

- WCAG 2.2 AA minimum target
- Focus rings: `box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px brand-600, 0 0 0 4px rgba(128,0,32,0.12)`
- No `outline: none` without replacement
- Reduced-motion: all animations resolve instantly to final state
- Content remains visible without JS (no `opacity: 0` without CSS fallback)
- Touch targets: minimum 44×44px
- Semantic landmarks: `<header>`, `<nav>`, `<main>`, `<footer>`, `<article>`, `<section>` with `aria-label`
- Heading order: H1 → H2 → H3 (no skips)

---

## 14. Anti-Patterns (Do Not Use)

| Anti-Pattern | Reason |
|-------------|--------|
| `transition: all` | Performance + unintended side effects |
| Gradient text | Accessibility (not readable by screen readers, can't be selected) |
| AI purple gradients | Wrong brand direction |
| Glassmorphism as primary style | Too trendy, not enterprise |
| Neon/glow effects | Wrong for B2B trust signal |
| Giant bento grid | Casual, Apple-style, not enterprise |
| Identical cards for all content types | Lacks semantic differentiation |
| Oversized pill buttons | Casual B2C aesthetic |
| Hard-coded hex values in JSX | Use CSS variables |
| Fake metrics / fabricated content | Brand integrity |
| Infinite decorative animation | Distracting, inaccessible |

---

*This document is the master source of truth. Page-specific overrides are in `design-system/pages/`.*
